title: agraphis nutans
intro: Agraphis nutans, also known as Himalayan lavender, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Agraphis nutans include its ability to calm the nervous system, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote better sleep. Agraphis nutans can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
